questionHtml: The switch is closed at time t = 0. Explain how the voltmeter reading varies after the switch is closed.
markschemeHtml:
initial deflection by voltmeter falling to zero reading ✓

emf is induced «only» while the field / flux is changing ✓

meta.title: The switch is closed at time t = 0. Explain how the voltmeter reading varies after the switch is closed.
